criteria.name: qa_qc_report.csv exists after pipeline run
criteria.evidence: git show HEAD:data/processed/qa_qc_report.csv — file exists with 7 rows (6 stations + header)

criteria.name: Report has row for every station processed
criteria.evidence: 6 stations in report: greenwich, cavendish, north_rustico, stanley_bridge, tracadie, stanhope

criteria.name: Report includes per-variable missingness percentages
criteria.evidence: Multiple missing_pct_* columns present (missing_pct_air_temperature_c, missing_pct_relative_humidity_pct, missing_pct_rain_mm, etc.)

criteria.name: Report includes duplicate timestamp counts per station
Report is added to pipeline manifest artifacts
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json has 417 artifacts including imputation_report but no qa_qc_report. cleaning.py writes qa_qc_report.csv at line 673-674 but never registers it in the manifest.

failing_nodes.message: AC-QC-6: qa_qc_report.csv is written to disk but not registered as an artifact in pipeline_manifest.json. The imputation_report IS in the manifest (type=imputation_report), but qa_qc_report is missing. Ralph must add manifest registration after writing the QA/QC report.

summary: Phase 5 QA/QC reporting: 5 of 6 acceptance criteria pass. AC-QC-6 fails — qa_qc_report.csv exists and contains correct data but is not registered in pipeline_manifest.json. Pre-flight data was stale (run before commit 5c0900e); grep confirms both generate_qa_qc_report and calculate_completeness exist in src/pea_met_network/qa_qc.py. All 5 Phase 5 pytest tests pass.
